# EcoTrack Carbon Footprint Awareness Platform

> EcoTrack is an interactive web application that helps individuals understand, track, and reduce their personal carbon footprint through data-driven insights and actionable recommendations.

## Core Pillars

- **Understand**: Learn about carbon emissions through an interactive equivalency engine and educational modals.
- **Track**: Log daily activities across Transport, Diet, and Energy categories and monitor trends over time with visual charts.
- **Reduce**: Receive personalized, actionable recommendations to lower your environmental impact and set reduction goals.

## Key Features

- Real-time carbon footprint calculator with category breakdowns
- Interactive dashboard with trend charts and pie breakdowns
- Personalized AI-driven reduction recommendations
- Goal setting and progress tracking
- Dark/light theme support with full WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility
- Offline-capable with localStorage persistence

## Technology Stack

- React 19 with TypeScript
- Vite 8 build system
- Recharts for data visualization
- Vitest with React Testing Library for 100% test coverage
- Docker + Nginx for production deployment on Google Cloud Run
